notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the golang SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.6. It addresses 37 CVEs: CVE-2025-61729, CVE-2025-58183, CVE-2021-3115, CVE-2025-61726, CVE-2025-61728, and 32 more.
notes.title: Description
